name: service-interface-pattern
description: IAuthService demonstrates service interface pattern - pure TypeScript interface with NO runtime imports. Defines contract for signUp, signIn, signOut, getSession, onAuthStateChange. Implementations exist for Supabase and Mock providers.
relevantCode: export interface IAuthService { signUp(credentials): Promise<AuthSession>; signIn(credentials): Promise<AuthSession>; ... }
recommendation: Create ITeamsService with methods: createOrganization, createTeam, createApp, addMembership, removeMembership, resolvePermissions, getOrganizationsForUser, getTeamsForOrg.
